title: L0 Agent Capability Type Registry
description: Bootstrap registry for agent capability types. RFC 6763 (DNS-SD) pattern. Types MUST be verifiable — no self-declared unauditable capabilities.

attestation.description: Agent can produce signed attestations about other agents or actions
attestation.verification: Ed25519 signature on attestation payload, verifiable via public key in discovery record

delivery.description: Agent can deliver work products per agreed specification
delivery.verification: Content hash match against agreed spec + delivery receipt in Merkle log

scoring.description: Agent can evaluate and score other agents' work or trust profiles
scoring.verification: Scoring methodology published + deterministic reproduction from inputs

settlement.description: Agent can execute on-chain transactions (payments, locks, slashing)
settlement.verification: On-chain transaction hash + block confirmation at finalized commitment level

discovery.description: Agent can resolve other agents' capabilities and trust endpoints
discovery.verification: Returns valid L0 discovery records with TTL + version

constraints.versioning: semver major only (breaking changes increment version)
constraints.registration: PR to this registry, reviewed by 2+ existing type owners
